[INST] You are an expert smart contract auditor. Find a vulnerability in this decompiled EVM C pseudo-code and output ONLY a valid ZCC .ir script to exploit it:

function test() { call(msg.sender, gas(), balance(address())); }
[/INST]
IR_FUNC exploit_reentrancy
  IR_CALL t0 fallback
  IR_RET t0
</s>
